programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
How to Talk to Girls at Parties
The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Luca is kidnapped by his father, Thony enlists the FBI to find her son. Meanwhile, an incident involving Chris forces Fiona to shield her son by any means necessary.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony's in-laws come to Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Thony must help Arman by meeting with Robert Kamdar, Nadia's gregarious and charming ex-lover.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony joins Arman and Nadia in a risky new venture to save Luca's life, while Fiona fights to protect Chris when the threat of damaging evidence emerges.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After Fiona puts herself in a dangerous situation, Thony resorts to calling Arman for help. Garrett works to get put back on the Cortez case.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Arman and Nadia realise Thony's ethical methods aren't making them enough money. Fiona takes the lead on starting her and Thony's new cleaning business.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: An unexpected trio emerges in the mission to take down Cortes, as Arman and Nadia's relationship hits a breaking point. Fiona attempts to keep her family safe.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Detective Flores digs deeper into the cause of Marco's death. Meanwhile, Thony, Arman and Garrett team up to bring down Kamdar.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Luca grows sicker, Thony will do anything to get him a new medication, including asking Kamdar for help. Meanwhile, Arman confronts Nadia about her secret.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Arman and Nadia plan their riskiest scheme, Thony questions her alliances while Luca's health worsens and Garrett closes in on a suspect.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony is confronted by Garrett regarding the truth behind Maya's death as Nadia tries to stay on Kamdar's good side. Meanwhile, Fiona helps Luca celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Arman mysteriously disappears, Thony and Nadia team up to look for him. Fiona tries to manage the aftermath of her deportation and reconnects with an old flame.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Thony is tasked with cleaning cars for Ramona, she comes across a distressed woman in need of medical attention; Fiona attempts to return to the States.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony focuses on getting Fiona back home with the help of Jorge; Nadia continues to investigate Arman's disappearance and finds herself face-to-face with Ramona.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Thony and Fiona are faced with a terrifying situation, they set out to fix it before it's too late; Jorge throws a wrench in Ramona's plan to find Arman, and Ramona starts to question his allegiance.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony gets a new lead on Arman's whereabouts; Ramona tries to cut a deal with Nadia; Luca attends his first day of school.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona grows increasingly apprehensive of Thony's involvement in Arman's life and suspects Thony and Nadia of jeopardising her and Jorge's plans; Jeremy volunteers to install security equipment at Fiona's house.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona considers an offer from Thony that causes a shift in their dynamic. Jorge teams up with Nadia as a way to use her connections. Russo's team gets closer to breaking their case open.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: After finding cameras in her home, Thony attempts to get her family's normal life back by turning down an offer from Ramona; Jorge proposes a new money-laundering venture to Nadia.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona tries to recruit Thony into her business; the FBI organizes a plan to take down Ramona.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Arman mysteriously disappears, Thony and Nadia team up to look for him. Fiona tries to manage the aftermath of her deportation and reconnects with an old flame.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony turns to Ramona to get Fiona back to the United States but finds herself indebted; a secret Fiona has kept hidden for decades comes to light, creating friction between herself and family members.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Thony is tasked with cleaning cars for Ramona, she comes across a distressed woman in need of medical attention; Fiona attempts to return to the States.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Thony and Fiona are faced with a terrifying situation, they set out to fix it before it's too late; Jorge throws a wrench in Ramona's plan to find Arman, and Ramona starts to question his allegiance.

programme.title: AFLW: Semi Final HAW v CAR
AFLW: Semi Final MEL v ADE
programme.desc: A long-standing AFLW rivalry renews as Melbourne hosts Adelaide at Ikon Park with a place in the Preliminary Final on the line.

programme.title: AFLW: Semi Final HAW v CAR
programme.desc: It's do-or-die for the Hawks and Blues as they battle it out in a Semi Final showdown under lights at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFL: North Melbourne v Carlton
programme.desc: The Roos and Blues each hunt their second win of the season as they meet in the annual Good Friday Superclash.

programme.title: AFLW: Semi Final MEL v ADE
AFLW: Semi Final HAW v CAR
programme.desc: It's do-or-die for the Hawks and Blues as they battle it out in a Semi Final showdown under lights at Ikon Park.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1999 R16 WC v FRE

programme.desc: Relive the best games and magic moments from the stars of our great game.

programme.title: AFLW: Semi Final HAW v CAR
programme.desc: It's do-or-die for the Hawks and Blues as they battle it out in a Semi Final showdown under lights at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFL Mini: Round 1 SYD v BRI
AFL Mini: Round 1 ADE v STK
programme.desc: The Crows and the Saints kick off their 2025 campaign.

programme.title: AFL Mini: Round 1 WC v GC
programme.desc: Next up on your Sunday Ticket, the Suns travel to Perth as Andrew McQualter makes his debut as West Coast senior coach.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2005 SF SYD v GEE
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: AFLW: Semi Final MEL v ADE
programme.desc: A long-standing AFLW rivalry renews as Melbourne hosts Adelaide at Ikon Park with a place in the Preliminary Final on the line.

programme.title: AFL: #1 Draft Picks: Nick Riewoldt
programme.sub-title: 2009 Preliminary Final St Kilda v Western Bulldogs
programme.desc: The AFL Draft provides clubs with the chance to battle it out over fresh talent, and there is no greater honour than being selected as No. 1.

programme.title: AFL: #1 Draft Picks: Luke Hodge
programme.desc: The AFL Draft provides clubs with the chance to battle it out over fresh talent, and there is no greater honour than being selected as No. 1.

programme.title: Dermie Delivers: #1 Draft Picks
programme.desc: What better way to celebrate the feats of the champions of the 80's & 90's, than with some of their best ever games. It's all killer, no filler - Dermie Delivers.

programme.title: AFL: #1 Draft Picks: Matt Rowell
programme.sub-title: 2024 Opening Round Gold Coast v Richmond
programme.desc: The AFL Draft provides clubs with the chance to battle it out over fresh talent, and there is no greater honour than being selected as No. 1.

programme.title: AFL: #1 Draft Picks: Brett Deledio
programme.desc: The AFL Draft provides clubs with the chance to battle it out over fresh talent, and there is no greater honour than being selected as No. 1.

programme.title: AFL: #1 Draft Picks: Jamarra Ugle-Hagan
programme.desc: The AFL Draft provides clubs with the chance to battle it out over fresh talent, and there is no greater honour than being selected as No. 1.

programme.title: AFLW: Semi Final Melbourne v Adelaide
Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We kick things off by appraising the actions of some of the larger beasts that take to the roads in Big Rigs, before moving on to the smaller creatures in Two-Wheeled Terrors.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We try to inject a bit of culture as we get to grips with The Art Of Overtaking, before realising there's no culture in car crashes, when we showcase another round of Off Road Rodeo.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts alongside the regulars with guest performer Nyima Funk and star guest from Nikita, Maggie Q. Maggie gets increasingly Irish with Ryan in a drink and food fuelled Helping Hands.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.sub-title: May the Norse Be With You
programme.desc: The Brotherhood uncovers a new structure under the swamp and a new theory suggests the Vikings worked with the Templars to help them get to Oak Island.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: As the Crystal Cove Fog Festival nears, Velma struggles to find answers to the serial killer problem, and a date. Daphne explores feelings for a mysterious stranger. Fred and Norville face off for the Fog King crown.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We start this show at a breakneck pace as we try to keep up with the Speeders, before trying to answer that age-old question, are Two Wheels Better Than Four?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Hosted by Aisha Tyler, this episode features Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performer Gary Anthony Williams and star guest Wilson Bethel from the CW's Hart of Dixie.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and special guest Draya Michele catch kids overspending in "Bad Kids Bad Credit" takeover social meeting with "Next Level Posting" and try on some "Pant-imals".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Jenny Eclair enjoys potatoes falling on her head while Ivo Graham fumes. As emotions run high, everyone goes all out to impress the ever demanding Taskmaster.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark and his team deliver an eight-million-dollar power station to a tiny Micronesian island. Sludge goes into the Western Australian outback to deliver vital fuel supplies to communities cut off by bad weather.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The war for ice road supremacy is heating up and Polar Industries is pushing their drivers to the absolute limit. Art Burke must cross one of the longest winter roads in the world.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: When Craig's little brother Brent cuts corners to get extra wood off the mountain, a mistake shuts the entire operation down.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The oldest facility in Los Angeles is where the newest buyers make their debut. Brandi and Jarrod try to piece their way to a win, while Ivy manages to hoard most of the units for himself.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark and his team deliver an eight-million-dollar power station to a tiny Micronesian island. Sludge goes into the Western Australian outback to deliver vital fuel supplies to communities cut off by bad weather.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A child is caught driving at 12 years old, a scrub fire by the motorway causes chaos, and senior constables Errol and Sheryll stop a drunk driver who's back to old tricks.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A drunk driver has a bad attitude and cops chase stolen shampoo.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The war for ice road supremacy is heating up and Polar Industries is pushing their drivers to the absolute limit. Art Burke must cross one of the longest winter roads in the world.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette must test Noa's driving skills while Ceci helps Barb prepare for her new manager portrait.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette runs into an old friend and pretends to be a customer, not an employee, to avoid embarrassment.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: A comedy news show featuring humorous takes on top stories.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 2nd Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 4th Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: Ashes: 2021/22 4th Test
programme.desc: The 2021/22 Ashes witnessed the new Test captain, Pat Cummins, silencing critics against a misfiring Joe Root-led England. Head, Labuschagne, and Khawaja put on a batting clinic, while debutant Scotty Boland got '6 at the G'.

programme.title: Ashes: 2006/07 1st Test
programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.title: Ashes: 2006/07 1st Test
programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.desc: The final 18 holes of the Pebble Beach Pro-Am are underway. With a huge prize purse and a competitive field, there's a lot at stake.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: A Special Operations veteran is now into peace, serenity and non-violence. But when Trautman is held by the Soviets and interrogated, the CIA can do nothing and Rambo must come to his aid.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: Gogglebox Australia
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers share their thoughts on the week's TV highlights including, Colin From Accounts, The Swap, 1923, Blowing LA and Surgeons.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie try to complete their tower stairwell; Nick and Nicole need to finish their kitchen and dining room in time for a first birthday party.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the Ulster Folk Museum, items include a DeLorean car, a stone head unearthed in a garden and a carving linked to maritime history.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and the team are in an antiques centre in South Yorkshire. Experts Tim Weeks and Colin Young help to guide the way as the teams have 300 pounds to spend.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Bob, 51, is airlifted after falling 6m from a roof ladder; Anthony, 68, is admitted with a chronic gas problem causing constant burping.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At the Ulster Folk Museum, items include a DeLorean car, a stone head unearthed in a garden and a carving linked to maritime history.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.sub-title: Malvern 32 - Bbc Children In Need Special
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah is in the Essex countryside helping a church minister and his wife to make their very first house purchase for a 425,000-pounds budget.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Kiell Smith-Bynoe kicks off the competition with 12 sewers. Judges Patrick Grant and Esme Young challenge them with a denim A-line midi skirt and a t-shirt transformation. Who will shine?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Tyson, Kristine, Bailey and Olivia have a menagerie of animals. With three dogs, a horse, sheep and a passion for quad bikes, they need more land and are desperate to sell. Andrew, Shyanna and Charlie: help!

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a retired teacher find a seaside home on the Jurassic Coast and enjoys a yoga session after a seagull mishap.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Wollaton Hall, highlights include a fire extinguisher cocktail shaker that stuns the silver expert Kate Flitcroft.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles and the team hunt for bargains at Exeter's Westpoint Arena. Helping the red and blue teams spend 300 pounds on three items are Nick Hall and Richard Madley.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Graham's visiting Elegans, a stunner of a garden in his own neighbourhood. With a collection of 300 camellias, 50 Japanese maples and more, Elegans Garden is among the prettiest private gardens in NSW.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha convert front steps for wedding season; Nick and Nicole finish their dining room for their son's first birthday.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil is searching with Gemma and Jac, who want enough space for them, their dogs, and a home office. Meanwhile, Kirstie is with Anne and Tom, who need somewhere cosy, but with room for visiting family.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jade and James bought a three-bedroom, two-bath home two years ago for $530,000, and need to sell up to gain more space and independence now their family is growing. Can Andrew, Shyanna and Charlie help?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Craving the outdoor lifestyle they enjoyed in New Zealand, a young couple seeks Nicki Chapman's help to find a new home in North Yorkshire for running, cycling, and walking.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Love fills the hotel as staff celebrate romance and friendship, from anniversaries and roses to heartfelt moments shared among the Four Seasons family.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a retired teacher find a seaside home on the Jurassic Coast and enjoys a yoga session after a seagull mishap.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: 51-year-old Bob is airlifted to St George's after falling twenty feet from a ladder while repairing the roof of his house. 68-year-old retired pharmacologist Anthony has a chronic gas problem and is burping constantly.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Dr Sienna Brooks, and together they must race across Europe against the clock to foil a deadly global plot.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Marriage Made for Murder
Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: The Dressmaker
programme.desc: With her glamorous style and sewing machine in tow, a woman returns to her remote home town to set things right, but finds her talent by transforming the women she left behind.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: A wisecracking New Yorker, whose one-night stand with a beautiful Mexican girl comes back to bite him - all the way to the altar.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest - and grossest - sequel. Jim finally proposes to Michelle, but nothing goes smoothly in this finale which will keep die-hard Pie eaters coming back.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Since Elizabeth, who is a down-to-earth high school teacher, and Donovan, a reserved New York businessman, are so different, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Bruce Wayne returns to Gotham and unveils his alter-ego: Batman, a masked crusader who uses his strength, intellect, and high-tech deceptions to fight the sinister forces that threaten the city.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies, must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller, a father goes undercover as an informant and infiltrates a drug cartel on a dangerous mission risking everything to save his son from going to prison.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: In search of his next big story, Eddie lands an exclusive interview with convicted murderer Cletus Kasady, who discovers Eddie's secret and becomes the host for Carnage.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a street-racing gang led by Dom Toretto, whose fans treat him like a rock star. Dirty money, big-rig hijacking, and high-octane action rev up this thrill ride.

programme.title: Apples Never Fall
programme.desc: As the mystery surrounding Joy's disappearance deepens, Amy gathers the community together in the hopes of bringing her mother home.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: His vengeance fulfilled, the Jackal flees Munich and tries to quell Nuria's suspicions; Bianca follows a new lead in her hunt for the Jackal.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: His vengeance fulfilled, the Jackal flees Munich and tries to quell Nuria's suspicions; Bianca follows a new lead in her hunt for the Jackal.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Riccardo takes advantage of his good fortune.

programme.title: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Riccardo takes advantage of his good fortune.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: 3615 Monique diversify their services by hiring new employees, Simon, Stephanie and Toni, who are ready to take over the telematics market.

programme.title: Cheeky Business
programme.desc: 3615 Monique diversify their services by hiring new employees, Simon, Stephanie and Toni, who are ready to take over the telematics market.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The double murder of gangland boss Marcus Maguire and his son Callum sends shockwaves across the criminal community in London.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The double murder of gangland boss Marcus Maguire and his son Callum sends shockwaves across the criminal community in London.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: With December approaching, Brokenwood is alive and well with Christmas spirit. That is, until a gruesome sight confronts Mike and his team: Santa Claus with his throat slit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing, Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis, and Carol helps Hornsby with a labour dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing, Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis, and Carol helps Hornsby with a labour dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop. Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine check-up. Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop. Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine check-up. Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The double murder of gangland boss Marcus Maguire and his son Callum sends shockwaves across the criminal community in London.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The double murder of gangland boss Marcus Maguire and his son Callum sends shockwaves across the criminal community in London.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: When an elite assassin, the Jackal, carries out his latest kill, it catches the attention of a British intelligence officer, who starts to hunt him down.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: With his previous client backing out of payment, the Jackal's reputation is on the line and he starts to plot revenge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing, Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis, and Carol helps Hornsby with a labour dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop. Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine check-up. Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: With his previous client backing out of payment, the Jackal's reputation is on the line and he starts to plot revenge.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: The family gather at the hospital as Mel tries to make amends with Clare; as a last resort, Trish enlists Mel to help her track down a missing Spencer.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: The family gather at the hospital as Mel tries to make amends with Clare; as a last resort, Trish enlists Mel to help her track down a missing Spencer.

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: After Trish and Spence win their dream house at auction, the sisters go to the new place to celebrate, where well-kept secrets bubble to the surface.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While helping a stranger from another community, Maggie, Lydia and Elijah run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While helping a stranger from another community, Maggie, Lydia and Elijah run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a mission. Daryl and Rosita pull a heist.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: Paul takes the family to Puerto Rico for his own self-help seminar. As Cathy gets some bad news about her cancer treatments, she vows to use the vacation to face her fears of the water and her own mortality.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: After getting lost during a scuba diving lesson, Cathy lands in the boat of a local fisherman. Meanwhile, Paul creates an alter ego when he is approached by a woman at the hotel bar.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: After getting lost during a scuba diving lesson, Cathy lands in the boat of a local fisherman. Meanwhile, Paul creates an alter ego when he is approached by a woman at the hotel bar.

programme.title: The Last Anniversary
programme.desc: After more frustrating encounters with the men on the island, Sophie decides it is time to leave. Margie and Veronika uncover more clues about Alice and Jack in Connie's old family photographs.

programme.title: The Last Anniversary
programme.desc: After more frustrating encounters with the men on the island, Sophie decides it is time to leave. Margie and Veronika uncover more clues about Alice and Jack in Connie's old family photographs.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The double murder of gangland boss Marcus Maguire and his son Callum sends shockwaves across the criminal community in London.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Morning Show: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a supermarket owner puts TV chef Billie Blessings and Detective Ian Jackson on the trail of a possible serial killer.

programme.title: Morning Show: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a supermarket owner puts TV chef Billie Blessings and Detective Ian Jackson on the trail of a possible serial killer.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna, the world's most famous movie star, and William, a stagnant business owner, cross paths and fall in love. But can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker struggles to juggle his life with his Spider-Man persona as a new foe emerges: the deranged scientist, Otto Octavius.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Khumba
programme.desc: Rejected by his superstitious herd, a half-striped zebra embarks on a daring quest to earn his stripes but finds the courage and self-acceptance to save all the animals of the Great Karoo.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: Dog Man, part dog, part man, is on a mission to protect and serve while chasing down the feline supervillain, Petey the Cat.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck hoping to make their business a success.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: The world of Pokemon comes to life! The story begins when ace detective Harry Goodman goes mysteriously missing, prompting his 21-year-old son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding in the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu: a hilariously wise-cracking, adorable super-sleuth who is a puzzlement even to himself. Finding that they are uniquely equipped to communicate with one another, Tim and Pikachu join forces on a thrilling adventure to unravel the tangled mystery. Chasing clues together through the neon-lit streets of Ryme City - a sprawling, modern metropolis where humans and Pokemon live side by side in a hyper-realistic live-action world - they encounter a diverse cast of Pokemon characters and uncover a shocking plot that could destroy this peaceful co-existence and threaten the whole Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial finds a friend in 10-year-old Elliot, while members of a task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from outer space.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure. The pair quickly become best buddies - and partners in crime - pickpocketing their way out of poverty and quickly believing they are the real cats' whiskers! Setting their sights higher, Top Cat and Benny hatch a plan to steal diamonds from crime boss Mr Big. Along the way, our heroes meet fellow alley cats Choo Choo, Fancy-Fancy and Brain, and together they're a formidable bunch. However, when Mr Big catches up with them and captures Top Cat, can his new friends save the day?

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: Based on a true story, veteran deep-sea divers brave brutal ocean conditions to save a trapped crew-mate stranded hundreds of feet beneath the surface.

programme.title: A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: After their parents perish in a terrible fire, three orphaned siblings are placed in the care of the evil genius Count Olaf, who hatches an outrageous plot to steal their inheritance.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A lonely, unhinged cable TV installer goes crazy as he forces his friendship on a lovelorn bachelor. A black comedy with pointed social commentary.

programme.title: Housos Vs. Authority
programme.desc: A petty crook embarks on a road trip to Uluru in a drug-laden campervan.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: When a cowardly farmer meets the woman of his dreams, things go south after he realises she is married to a notorious gunslinger.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A 27-year-old spoiled brat must repeat all 12 grades of school - in just 24 weeks - to earn his father's respect and prove he can run the family's multimillion-dollar empire.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper.
